subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath subdued the world through His Most Great Name and hath, at all times, sent down from the heaven of His grace the essence of His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی سخر العالم باسمه الاعظم و انزل فی کل الاحیان من سماء فضل اسمه
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @power of prayer, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Word of God and human limitations
